signals.headline: Iran x Israel/US Conflict Market Dominates X Predictions at 97% Odds for End by Dec 31 | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Iran x Israel/US Conflict Market Dominates X Predictions at 97% Odds for End by Dec 31 | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Polymarket's X predictions page shows 1379 live markets, with the top one being "Iran x Israel/US conflict ends by...?" at 97% probability for December 31, reflecting over $121M in total X-related trading volume and real-time trader sentiment.[1]

signals.headline: Elon Musk Tweet Count Market Hits $13M Volume with 88% on 300-319 Tweets (Apr 10-17) | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk Tweet Count Market Hits $13M Volume with 88% on 300-319 Tweets (Apr 10-17) | NO | HIGH confidence**  
The leading Tweet Markets active market is “Elon Musk # tweets April 10 - April 17, 2026?” at 88% odds for 300-319 tweets and $13M volume, amid 22-28 active tweet-related markets totaling $28.4M volume; a prior market for Apr 14-21 shows similar high engagement.[4][3]

signals.headline: No Whale Bets, Smart Money Moves, or Mispriced Markets Reported in Real-Time Data | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
No Whale Bets, Smart Money Moves, or Mispriced Markets Reported in Real-Time Data | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Search results highlight active volumes and odds on Polymarket but lack specifics on X posts about whales, tips, or mispriced markets like Nikita Bier's X role (7% yes by June 30) or Trump-Iran ceasefire; no trader discussions on these are detailed.[1][4]

signals.headline: No Recent Confirmations, Announcements, or Resolutions Noted to Shift Markets | NO | HIGH confidence**

No Recent Confirmations, Announcements, or Resolutions Noted to Shift Markets | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Odds like 97% for Iran conflict end-date and 88% Musk tweets update dynamically with trades, but no breaking confirmations (e.g., ceasefires, launches) are cited as just-resolved to impact markets right now.[1][4]
